data.name: DEPENDENCY_AUTO_REGISTERED
data.value: {0} depends on {1}, it will be added automatically.

data.name: DEPENDENCY_REQUIRED
data.value: {0} requires {1}, you should add it manually.

data.name: DEPENDENCY_SUGGESTED
data.value: {0} suggests adding {1}.

data.name: INVALID_ARGUMENT
data.value: The request contains an invalid argument.

data.name: TENANT_RESOLUTION_FAILED
data.value: Unable to resolve tenant for the current request.

data.name: FAILED_PRECONDITION
data.value: The request cannot be executed in the current system state.

data.name: UNAUTHENTICATED
data.value: The request does not have valid authentication credentials.

data.name: PERMISSION_DENIED
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action.

data.name: NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: The resource already exists.

data.name: CONCURRENCY_MISMATCH
data.value: A concurrency conflict occurred while saving to the database.

data.name: VALIDATION_ERROR
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED
data.value: Rate limit exceeded.

data.name: NAMED_NOT_FOUND
data.value: {0} '{1}' not found.

data.name: GENERIC_ERROR
data.value: An error occurred.

data.name: NOT_EMPTY
data.value: '{0}' must not be empty.

data.name: UNSUPPORTED_ALGORITHM
data.value: Unsupported algorithm: {0}.

data.name: NOT_SUPPORTED
data.value: '{0}' is not supported.

data.name: NOT_CONFIGURED
data.value: '{0}' is not configured.

data.name: SECTOR_IDENTIFIER_URI_REQUIRED
data.value: Application has no sector identifier URI and no redirect URIs.

data.name: PATTERN_REQUIRED
data.value: Cannot resolve a resource name without a pattern.

data.name: INVALID_TABLE_NAME
data.value: Invalid table name '{0}' of type '{1}'.

data.name: TABLE_KEY_REQUIRED
data.value: Entity must have at least one [TableKey].

data.name: ENTITY_KEY_COUNT_MISMATCH
data.value: Entity key count mismatch.

data.name: PARAMETER_NOT_RESOLVED
data.value: Cannot resolve parameter '{0}' of type '{1}'.

data.name: METHOD_PARAMETER_NOT_RESOLVED
data.value: Cannot resolve parameter '{0}' of method '{1}' on type '{2}'.

data.name: CONVERSION_FAILED
data.value: Unable to convert '{0}' to {1}.

data.name: SOURCE_FIELD_REQUIRED
data.value: Mapping for field {0} is missing a source field.

data.name: TENANT_NOT_INITIALIZED
data.value: Tenant is not initialized successfully.

data.name: ENTRY_ASSEMBLY_REQUIRED
data.value: Entry assembly is null.

data.name: IMPLEMENTATION_REQUIRED
data.value: The type {0} does not implement {1}.

data.name: INVALID_PAYLOAD
data.value: Invalid request payload.

data.name: CROSS_PARENT_UNSUPPORTED
data.value: Cross-parent operation is not supported for '{parent}'.

data.name: INVALID_PAGE_TOKEN
data.value: The page token is invalid or has expired.

data.name: INVALID_EXPRESSION
data.value: The {0} expression is malformed.

data.name: INVALID_FIELD
data.value: Invalid field.

data.name: INVALID_FIELD_NAME
data.value: Invalid field name '{0}'.

data.name: FUNCTION_NOT_REGISTERED
data.value: Function '{0}' not registered.

data.name: INVALID_PAGE_SIZE
data.value: The page_size must not be negative.

data.name: INVALID_PARENT
data.value: The parent '{parent}' is invalid.

data.name: AUTHENTICATOR_KEY_REQUIRED
data.value: The user manager must produce an authenticator key after reset.

data.name: INVALID_CLIENT_CREDENTIALS
data.value: The client credentials are missing or invalid.

data.name: CLIENT_SECRET_REQUIRED
data.value: Client secret is required for confidential clients.

data.name: MULTIPLE_CLIENT_AUTH_METHODS
data.value: The request uses more than one client authentication method.

data.name: INVALID_GRANT
data.value: The provided grant is invalid, expired, or revoked.

data.name: PKCE_VERIFIER_MISMATCH
data.value: The code_verifier does not match the code_challenge.

data.name: INVALID_SCOPE
data.value: The requested scope is not allowed for this client.

data.name: UNAUTHORIZED_GRANT_TYPE
data.value: The client is not authorized to use this grant type.

data.name: ACCESS_DENIED
data.value: The resource owner or authorization server denied the request.

data.name: INVALID_REDIRECT_URI
data.value: The redirect_uri does not match any registered URI.

data.name: USER_CONSENT_REQUIRED
data.value: User consent is required.

data.name: USER_AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED
data.value: User authentication is required.

data.name: AUTHORIZATION_PENDING
data.value: The authorization request is still pending.

data.name: SLOW_DOWN
data.value: The polling interval is too short. Increase the interval and retry.

data.name: INTERNAL
data.value: An internal server error occurred.

data.name: INVALID_PROMPT_COMBINATION
data.value: The '{0}' prompt value cannot be combined with other values.

data.name: UNSUPPORTED_PROMPT
data.value: The '{0}' prompt value is not supported for this client.

data.name: USER_IDENTITY_REQUIRED
data.value: A valid user identity is required for this request.

data.name: REQUIRED_SETTING_MISSING
data.value: {0} is enabled but {1} is not set.

data.name: ABSOLUTE_URI_REQUIRED
data.value: {0} must be an absolute URI.

data.name: MISSING_DEPENDENT_SETTING
data.value: {0} is set but {1} is not set.

data.name: UNABLE_TO_RESOLVE
data.value: Unable to resolve {0}.

data.name: INVALID_FILTER
data.value: The filter expression is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_UPDATE_MASK
data.value: The update_mask path '{path}' is invalid: {reason}.

data.name: INVALID_READ_MASK
data.value: The read_mask path '{path}' is invalid: {reason}.

data.name: INVALID_NAME
data.value: The requested resource name '{name}' is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_ORDER_BY
data.value: The order_by expression is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_REFERENCE
data.value: '{value}' does not resolve to any registered resource type.

data.name: BACK_CHANNEL_LOGOUT_REQUIRES_SCHEDULING
data.value: Back-channel logout requires Scheduling.

data.name: PROCESS_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: Process name is required.

data.name: PROCESS_ALREADY_REGISTERED
data.value: Process definition '{name}' is already registered.

data.name: PROCESS_NOT_REGISTERED
data.value: Process definition '{name}' is not registered.

data.name: FLOW_RUNTIME_NOT_REGISTERED
data.value: Flow runtime '{engine}' is not registered with the host.

data.name: PROCESS_MESSAGE_NOT_DEFINED
data.value: Message '{name}' is not defined on the process.

data.name: FLOW_SOURCE_MODIFIED_CONCURRENTLY
data.value: Source '{name}' was modified concurrently; the flow transition was aborted.

data.name: FLOW_TIMER_MISSING_VARIABLE
data.value: Flow timer job is missing the '{variable}' variable.

data.name: FLOW_TIMER_REQUIRES_SCHEDULING
data.value: Process '{name}' reached a timer catch, which requires Scheduling.

data.name: INSIGHT_ACCESS_DENIED
data.value: Access to source '{name}' is denied.

data.name: OPERATION_ALREADY_FINISHED
data.value: Operation '{name}' has already finished.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_NO_START_EVENT
data.value: Process definition has no start event.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_START_EVENT_OUTGOING
data.value: Start event must have exactly one outgoing sequence flow.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_REQUIRES_ONE_START_EVENT
data.value: State machine requires exactly one start event.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_REQUIRES_END_EVENT
data.value: State machine requires at least one end event.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_INVALID_TRIGGER
data.value: Trigger '{trigger}' is not valid from state '{state}'.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_UNKNOWN_CURRENT_STATE
data.value: Current state '{state}' is not defined on the process.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_GATEWAY_UNSUPPORTED
data.value: Gateway '{name}' is not supported by the state machine engine.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_GATEWAY_KIND_UNSUPPORTED
data.value: Gateway '{name}' is not supported by the state machine engine. Only exclusive and event-based gateways are supported.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_CYCLIC_AUTO_FLOW
data.value: Cyclic auto-flow detected at element '{name}'; the process cannot reach a stable state.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_UNKNOWN_TARGET
data.value: Unknown target element '{name}'.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_ACTIVITY_UNSUPPORTED
data.value: Activity '{name}' is not supported by the state machine engine.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_ACTIVITY_LOOP_UNSUPPORTED
data.value: Activity '{name}' has loop characteristics which are not supported by the state machine engine.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_ELEMENT_UNREACHABLE
data.value: Element '{name}' is not reachable from the start event.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_FLOW_NO_SOURCE
data.value: Sequence flow '{id}' has no source element.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_FLOW_NO_TARGET
data.value: Sequence flow '{id}' has no target element.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_FLOW_UNKNOWN_SOURCE
data.value: Sequence flow '{id}' references unknown source element '{source}'.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_FLOW_UNKNOWN_TARGET
data.value: Sequence flow '{id}' references unknown target element '{target}'.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_END_EVENT_OUTGOING
data.value: End event '{name}' must not have outgoing flows.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_EVENT_GATEWAY_PARALLEL_UNSUPPORTED
data.value: Event-based gateway '{name}' has Parallel=true, which is not supported by the state machine engine. Only exclusive mode (Parallel=false) is supported.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_EVENT_GATEWAY_NO_OUTGOING
data.value: Event-based gateway '{name}' must have at least one outgoing flow.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_EVENT_GATEWAY_TARGET
data.value: Event-based gateway '{name}' outgoing flow must target an IntermediateCatchEvent.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_EXCLUSIVE_GATEWAY_NO_OUTGOING
data.value: Exclusive gateway '{name}' must have at least one outgoing flow.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_BOUNDARY_UNATTACHED
data.value: Boundary event '{name}' is not attached to any activity.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_BOUNDARY_UNKNOWN_ACTIVITY
data.value: Boundary event '{name}' is attached to unknown activity.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_BOUNDARY_NON_INTERRUPTING
data.value: Boundary event '{name}' is non-interrupting, which is not supported by the state machine engine.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_BOUNDARY_OUTGOING_REQUIRED
data.value: Boundary event '{name}' must have exactly one outgoing flow.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_CATCH_EVENT_NO_OUTGOING
data.value: Intermediate catch event '{name}' must have at least one outgoing flow.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_CATCH_EVENT_GATEWAY_REQUIRED
data.value: Intermediate catch event '{name}' can only be reached from an EventBasedGateway.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_ACTIVITY_NO_OUTGOING
data.value: Activity '{name}' has no outgoing flow and cannot proceed. Route it to an end event or another element.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_ACTIVITY_MIXED_GATEWAY
data.value: Activity '{name}' has mixed outgoing paths (direct and gateway). Each activity can have at most one outgoing path type.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_ACTIVITY_MIXED_END
data.value: Activity '{name}' has mixed outgoing paths (end event and other). Each activity can have at most one outgoing path type.

data.name: STATE_MACHINE_ACTIVITY_MULTIPLE_DIRECT
data.value: Activity '{name}' has multiple direct outgoing flows to activities. An activity can have at most one direct outgoing flow.
